transcript:
[Meeting date: 2026-07-07]
[00:00] You: All-hands engineering sync. We have 8 of us today. Let's go around and share status, blockers, and commitments.
[00:45] Speaker 1: API team status: we're 80% done with the payments refactor. I'll have the PR ready for review by July 10th.
[01:20] Speaker 2: Frontend team: the new dashboard is in QA. I'll address all QA findings by July 11th.
[02:00] Speaker 3: Mobile team: iOS build is blocked by a signing certificate expiry. I'll renew the certificates today and unblock the build.
[02:40] Speaker 4: Data team: the ETL pipeline migration is on track. I'll deploy the first segment to staging by July 9th.
[03:15] Speaker 5: DevOps: the Terraform refactor is complete. I'll run the final validation and merge to main by July 8th.
[03:55] Speaker 6: QA team: I have 14 test cases written for the payments flow. I'll have all test cases complete by July 12th.
[04:35] Speaker 7: Security: I'm doing a review of the new authentication middleware. I'll have my security review report done by July 14th.
[05:10] You: Good progress everyone. One shared item — we need a system-wide performance baseline before the release. Speaker 1, can you coordinate that?
[05:35] Speaker 1: I'll organize the performance baseline test with all teams. I'll schedule that for July 15th.
[06:00] Speaker 4: I should also flag — the data warehouse migration needs the new ETL deployed before it can proceed. Once Speaker 4 deploys staging, I'll start the warehouse migration prep.
[06:25] You: Note that as a dependency. Next all-hands is July 21st.

action_items.source_quote: I'll have the PR ready for review by July 10th.

decisions: System-wide performance baseline test required before release
